name: contour
description: Continuous coloring of beam-family structural elements (structure-beam, structure-cable, structure-liner, structure-pile) by a numeric attribute. Validated against 'plot item create structure-<type> contour ?' in FLAC2D 9.0.
examples: plot item create structure-beam contour moment
plot item create structure-beam contour force-shear
plot item create structure-cable contour force-axial
plot item create structure-cable contour grout-stress
plot item create structure-liner contour displacement legend active on
plot item create structure-pile contour displacement-x
notes: All beam-family types accept the shared list. Beam-only and cable-only attribute groups are documented separately because they were probed type-by-type.
structure-liner and structure-pile attribute lists are similar to structure-beam — probe 'plot item create structure-liner contour ?' / 'structure-pile contour ?' for type-specific extras.
For categorical coloring (group, id, model) use 'label <type>' rather than 'contour'.
